title: Ginger Ray Glass Hurricane Candle Holder with Gold Base and 1x White Candle Wedding Table Decoration 28cm
features: This hurricane glass candle holder will add an elegant touch to your table decor.
Each pack contains 1 clear glass candle holder with gold base, with 1 white dinner candle.
description: From the manufacturer Glass Hurricane Candle Holder This hurricane glass candle holder will add an elegant touch to your table decor. This versatile candle holder will look incredible displayed along your wedding reception tables, as well as placed around your ceremony for a romantic feel. Add these to your home after the big day for an elegant dinner table decoration.
